CustomField.description: Status A means that inventory differences have been posted for some of the items of the physical inventory document only. For these items, the physical inventory has been completed. Status X means that differences have been posted for all items of the physical inventory document. The document can now be archived.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Status A means that inventory differences have been posted for some of the items of the physical inventory document only. For these items, the physical inventory has been completed. Status X means that differences have been posted for all items.
CustomField.label: Status of Adjustment Posting
